hyperedges.description: Text animation system combining BlurReveal for reusable word-level animations and BlurRevealName for responsive responsive name with letter-level staggering
Complex hover interaction system: GlobalSpotlight follows mouse with proximity detection, ParticleCard spawns particles and applies tilt/magnetism, HoverCursor shows label, all coordinated via GSAP
Responsive design: mobile stacked cards, tablet 2-col bento, desktop 3-col bento; uses Tailwind sm:/md:/lg: prefixes and custom useMobile/useTablet hooks
Content pipeline: Page calls loadContent which uses loadYaml to load 7 YAML files (hero, summary, experience, skills, languages, education, links) and returns typed SiteContent
Hero section combines: BlurRevealName for animated introduction, RotatingText for cycling role descriptions, DownloadCVButton for CTA, AuroraGlow for atmospheric background
Scroll management: requestAnimationFrame-throttled scroll listener computes active section and blur overlay state based on viewport markers and 50% trigger line
Cinema-inspired loading screen with rotating network decoration, iris iris-shutter text reveal, film grain overlay, scan lines, and frame counter
Header with PulsingDot status indicator and floating bottom navigation pill with smooth layout animation and section highlighting

nodes.label: recall vs answer: Choose the Right Tool
nodes.norm_label: recall vs answer: choose the right tool

nodes.label: Memory Operations — Use the Right One
nodes.norm_label: memory operations — use the right one

nodes.label: loadContent
nodes.description: Loads all portfolio content from YAML files via loadYaml helper, returns complete SiteContent object

nodes.label: loadYaml
nodes.description: Generic helper function that loads and parses YAML files from content directory

nodes.label: PortfolioClient
nodes.description: Main client component rendering full portfolio with hero, summary, experience, skills, languages, education, and links sections

nodes.label: BlurRevealName
nodes.description: Responsive animated name component using staggered letter blur-reveal animation with responsive word wrapping for mobile/tablet/desktop

nodes.label: RotatingText
nodes.description: Component that cycles through text array with blur/fade transitions, displays rotating roles in hero

nodes.label: DownloadCVButton
nodes.description: Interactive download button with fill slide-in animation and icon slide-down on hover

nodes.label: LanguagesSection
nodes.description: Languages proficiency display with animated progress bars triggered on scroll intersection

nodes.label: AuroraGlow
nodes.description: Background aurora glow effect with multiple animated radial gradients drifting independently

nodes.label: getActiveSection
nodes.description: Determines active navigation section based on scroll position, checks section visibility at 40% viewport height

nodes.label: BlurReveal
nodes.description: Reusable blur-reveal animation component for text, splits into words with staggered entry animation, supports polymorphic HTML tags

nodes.label: MagicBentoGrid
nodes.description: Responsive bento grid layout with particle effects, spotlight glow, and project cards. Responsive: mobile stacked, tablet 2-col, desktop 3-col

nodes.label: BentoCard
nodes.description: Individual project card with particle effects, tilt, magnetism, and click ripple animations, includes project image and description

nodes.label: ParticleCard
nodes.description: Wrapper component providing particle spawning, glow effects, tilt, magnetism, and click effects for cards

nodes.label: GlobalSpotlight
nodes.description: Global spotlight glow that follows mouse, illuminates nearby cards with proximity-based intensity

nodes.label: HoverCursor
nodes.description: Custom cursor label that appears on card hover, springs-animated to follow mouse position with spring physics

nodes.label: CinemaLoadingScreen
nodes.description: Full-screen loading/splash screen with cinema aesthetic: rotating network decoration, rotating text, progress bar, scan line, film grain

nodes.label: NetworkDecoration
nodes.description: SVG network visualization with rotating rings, spokes, nodes, and tick marks in cinema aesthetic

nodes.label: PulsingDot
nodes.description: Animated pulsing dot with expanding ripple ring effect, used as status indicator in header

nodes.label: RootLayout
nodes.description: Root layout with Albert Sans font configuration, metadata, Agentation dev tool integration, and development script loading

nodes.label: Page
nodes.description: Server component that loads portfolio content and renders PortfolioClient with loaded data

nodes.label: Dependencies
nodes.description: Project dependencies including motion (animations), gsap, React 19, Next 15, tailwind, lucide-react icons, and animation libraries

nodes.label: Responsive Breakpoints Strategy
nodes.description: Tailwind v4 responsive design: mobile <640px, tablet 640-1023px, desktop >=1024px; uses sm:, md:, lg: prefixes; 768px mobile threshold

nodes.label: Project Metadata
nodes.description: Portfolio metadata: name=Navid's Portfolio, description=Photographer & Cinematographer, Gemini API capability
